sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ رِيمَا إِلَى المَكْتَبَةِ لِلبَحْثِ عَنْ كِتَابٍ.
sentences.translation: Rima je otišla u biblioteku tražiti knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: Reema went to the library to look for a book.

sentences.translation: Nije našla knjigu pa je pitala službenicu.
sentences.translationEn: She didn't find the book so she asked the employee.

sentences.translation: Službenica ju je uputila na pravi odjel.
sentences.translationEn: The employee directed her to the correct section.

sentences.translation: Pronašla je knjigu i zahvalila službenici.
sentences.translationEn: She found the book and thanked the employee.
